visualization.title: Average GPA by Year of Enrollment
visualization.description: Trend of average GPA across enrollment years with student count

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INTEGER AS enrollment_year,
  ROUND(AVG(gpa)::NUMERIC, 2) AS average_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC

visualization.title: Average GPA by Year of Enrollment
visualization.description: Trend of average GPA across enrollment years with student count

result.sql:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INTEGER AS enrollment_year,
  ROUND(AVG(gpa)::NUMERIC, 2) AS average_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC
